items.title: Dancer Robin Windsor depressed after leaving Strictly, actress tells inquest
items.description: Actress Lisa Riley is among those giving evidence to the inquest of her late Strictly dance partner.

items.title: What are Canada's gun ownership laws?
items.description: A deadly mass shooting in British Columbia is likely to increase scrutiny of whether Canada's gun laws should be toughened.

items.title: PM says peer did not give 'full account' over links to sex offender
items.description: Sir Keir Starmer was asked at Prime Minister's Questions about his decision to award a peerage to Lord Doyle.

items.title: Serial rail fare evader fined £3,600 over 112 unpaid tickets
items.description: Charles Brohiri travelled without buying a ticket on 112 train journeys over a period of nearly two years.

items.title: Swiss bar owners face questions from victims' lawyers over fire disaster
items.description: Jacques Moretti is questioned by lawyers over the New Year's Day fire disaster in Crans-Montana that left 41 people dead.
